/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -O3 -DNDEBUG -flto -fno-fat-lto-objects -fuse-ld=gold -Wl,--gc-sections -shared -Wl,-soname,libsdf_plugin.so -o ../../../../lib/libsdf_plugin.so CMakeFiles/sdf_plugin.dir/sdf.cc.o CMakeFiles/sdf_plugin.dir/bolt.cc.o CMakeFiles/sdf_plugin.dir/bowl.cc.o CMakeFiles/sdf_plugin.dir/gear.cc.o CMakeFiles/sdf_plugin.dir/register.cc.o CMakeFiles/sdf_plugin.dir/nut.cc.o CMakeFiles/sdf_plugin.dir/torus.cc.o  -Wl,-rpath,/workspace/LeapXELA_Hardware_ws/ros_ws/src/build/xela_point_cloud_representation/lib ../../../../lib/libmujoco.so.3.8.1
